mapper.sql: id, merchant_id AS "merchantId", merchant_order_no AS "merchantOrderNo", status, quote_asset AS "quoteAsset", quote_amount AS "quoteAmount", settle_asset AS "settleAsset", settle_amount AS "settleAmount", fee_asset AS "feeAsset", fee_amount AS "feeAmount", payment_channel AS "paymentChannel", payer_reference AS "payerReference", expires_at AS "expiresAt", paid_at AS "paidAt", settled_at AS "settledAt", cancelled_at AS "cancelledAt", description, metadata::text AS metadata, settlement_tx_id AS "settlementTxId", refund_tx_id AS "refundTxId", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt", version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchant_order ( id, merchant_id, merchant_order_no, status, quote_asset, quote_amount, settle_asset, settle_amount, fee_asset, fee_amount, payment_channel, payer_reference, expires_at, paid_at, settled_at, cancelled_at, description, metadata, settlement_tx_id, refund_tx_id, created_at, updated_at, version ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{merchantId}, #{merchantOrderNo}, #{status}, #{quoteAsset}, #{quoteAmount}, #{settleAsset}, #{settleAmount}, #{feeAsset}, #{feeAmount}, #{paymentChannel}, #{payerReference}, #{expiresAt}, #{paidAt}, #{settledAt}, #{cancelledAt}, #{description}, COALESCE(#{metadata}::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), #{settlementTxId}, #{refundTxId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{version} )
mapper.update: UPDATE merchant_order SET status = #{row.status}, settle_asset = #{row.settleAsset}, settle_amount = #{row.settleAmount}, fee_asset = #{row.feeAsset}, fee_amount = #{row.feeAmount}, paid_at = #{row.paidAt}, settled_at = #{row.settledAt}, cancelled_at = #{row.cancelledAt}, settlement_tx_id = #{row.settlementTxId}, refund_tx_id = #{row.refundTxId}, metadata = COALESCE(#{row.metadata}::jsonb, metadata), updated_at = #{row.updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{row.id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM merchant_order WHERE merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT FROM merchant_order WHERE status IN ('CREATED', 'PENDING_PAYMENT') AND payment_channel = 'CRYPTO' AND expires_at IS NOT NULL AND expires_at < #{now} ORDER BY expires_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_event (order_id, from_status, to_status, actor_type, actor_id, reason, payload) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{actorType}, #{actorId}, #{reason}, COALESCE(#{payload}::jsonb, NULL))
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id AS "orderId", from_status AS "fromStatus", to_status AS "toStatus", actor_type AS "actorType", actor_id AS "actorId", reason, payload::text AS payload, created_at AS "createdAt" FROM order_event WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_refund (id, order_id, amount, asset_code, reason, status, ledger_tx_id, requested_by, requested_at, completed_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderId}, #{amount}, #{assetCode}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{ledgerTxId}, #{requestedBy}, #{requestedAt}, #{completedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id AS "orderId", amount, asset_code AS "assetCode", reason, status, ledger_tx_id AS "ledgerTxId", requested_by AS "requestedBy", requested_at AS "requestedAt", completed_at AS "completedAt" FROM order_refund WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, order_id AS "orderId", amount, asset_code AS "assetCode", reason, status, ledger_tx_id AS "ledgerTxId", requested_by AS "requestedBy", requested_at AS "requestedAt", completed_at AS "completedAt" FROM order_refund WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY requested_at ASC
